TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Dalibor_Bagarić, title = Dalibor_Bagarić, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dalibor_Bagarić} }

S.FORM: Dalibor Bagarić nalecuhan i Munich, West Germany, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw. Dalibor Bagarić i 2000 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 24, namapili' tu nu Chicago Bulls putiput. 2 bulad 7 demiad, 1980 a mihca, Dalibor Bagarić, miunduay.
S.PHON: dar~ɾibor bagari* nar~ɾəʦuħan i muniʦħ, wəst gərmanj, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw. dar~ɾibor bagari* i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu ʦħiʦago bur~ɾr~ɾs putiput. * bur~ɾad * dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, dar~ɾibor bagari*, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Dalibor Bagarić nalecuhan i Munich, West Germany, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw. Dalibor Bagarić i 2000 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 24, namapili' tu nu Chicago Bulls putiput. 2 bulad 7 demiad, 1980 a mihca, Dalibor Bagarić, miunduay.
S.PHON: dar~ɾibor bagari* nar~ɾəʦuħan i muniʦħ, wəst gərmanj, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw. dar~ɾibor bagari* i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu ʦħiʦago bur~ɾr~ɾs putiput. * bur~ɾad * dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, dar~ɾibor bagari*, miunduaj.
